metadata.description: OmniResearch - A suite of AI agent skills for accelerating scientific innovation. Provides evidence-bound, traceable research workflow with contract system, dependency resolution, and skill tree progression. Supports 5 research patterns: Evidence-First, Idea-First, Decision-First, Experiment-First, and Rapid-Prototype.

skills.name: omr-core
skills.description: Foundation infrastructure for OmniResearch skills system. Provides contract system, dependency resolver, skill tree tracking, and pattern definitions. MUST install this before any other omr-* skills. Use when setting up OmniResearch environment or when skills report missing infrastructure dependencies.

skills.name: omr-bootstrap
skills.description: Initialize new OmniResearch project workspace. Creates complete directory structure (raw/, docs/, src/, wiki/), generates CLAUDE.md with research context, and displays skill tree showing available next actions. Use whenever starting a new research project. REQUIRES omr-core skill for infrastructure setup.

skills.name: omr-collection
skills.description: Material collection with passive reception philosophy. User provides sources → skill delivers materials. Supports direct input (URLs, DOIs, paths) and search queries. 4 handlers (Generic Web, Paper, GitHub, HuggingFace) with minimal parsing and balanced error handling. Use for collecting research materials, downloading papers, gathering repos. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace initialization.

skills.name: omr-evidence
skills.description: Define research questions and map evidence landscape by analyzing collected materials. Creates research brief with scope and success criteria, and evidence map showing primary evidence, supporting materials, and gaps. Uses strict evidence boundaries (proven, suggested, inferred). Use when ready to analyze collected papers and materials. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with materials.

skills.name: omr-research-plan
skills.description: Synthesize judgment from evidence and plan research execution. Creates judgment summary with confidence assessment and research plan with priorities, timeline, resources. Enforces Gate A review checking evidence coverage and question clarity. Use after evidence mapping complete. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with evidence map.

skills.name: omr-decision
skills.description: Create architectural decisions with alternatives, rationale, and evidence references. Documents at least 3 alternatives, selects best option based on evidence, identifies risks, ensures traceability. Enforces Gate B review checking alternatives and risks documented. Use when making architecture choices. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with research plan.

skills.name: omr-evaluation
skills.description: Design and run evaluation experiments to validate architecture decisions. Creates experiment specification with hypothesis, metrics, ground truth strategy. Implements prototype code and evaluation tests. Enforces Gate C review checking metrics and reproducibility. Use for testing and validation. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with decisions.

skills.name: omr-synthesis
skills.description: Write authoritative research findings in configurable formats (survey chapters, industry reports, academic manuscripts, executive briefs). Ensures traceability linking every claim to evidence. Enforces strict evidence boundaries and Gate D review checking no over-claiming. Use for documenting final results. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with completed research.

skills.name: omr-wiki
skills.description: Generate living knowledge base from synthesis findings. Extracts key concepts from survey/report/manuscript/brief and creates interlinked wiki pages for quick reference. Auto-generates wiki index with navigation. Links back to source documents. Use for creating browsable knowledge base. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with synthesis.

skills.name: omr-idea-note
skills.description: Capture speculative thoughts and creative insights outside formal research pipeline. Creates timestamped idea notes that can be linked to decisions and experiments later. Available anytime during research process. Supports Idea-First research pattern. Use for capturing hypotheses and insights. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace initialization.

skills.name: omr-reconcile
skills.description: Update research state when new evidence contradicts existing artifacts. Analyzes impact blast radius, proposes reconciliation options, archives old versions, updates downstream artifacts while maintaining traceability. Can trigger automatically after new material collection. Use when handling contradictions. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with existing artifacts.

skills.name: omr-research-archive
skills.description: Snapshot current research state for preservation or rollback. Creates timestamped archive of all artifacts, generates archive index, preserves version metadata. Can be triggered manually or automatically during reconciliation. Enables rollback to previous state. Use for saving research progress. REQUIRES omr-core and workspace with artifacts.
